articles.title: Ethereum Gas Fees Surge to 8-Month High As ERC-404 Tokens Take Off
articles.description: Gas fees on the Ethereum network have soared to levels not seen since March 2023, driven by the growing interest in a new experimental token standard known as ERC-404. Ethereum Gas Fees Reach Peak Levels On February 9, Ethereum gas prices soared to an average peak of 70 gwei, equivalent to $60 for a standard […]

articles.title: Ethiopia's Low-Cost Power Draws Chinese Mining Firms for Bitcoin Work
articles.description: Chinese firms head to Ethiopia for crypto mining, lured by cheap electricity and legal mining

articles.title: Top-Trader Picks Cardano As Bull Market Leader: Here’s Why
articles.description: In a post on X (formerly Twitter), acclaimed crypto trader Gert van Lagen has pinpointed Cardano (ADA) as the potential frontrunner of the ongoing bull market. His analysis leans heavily on Cardano’s foundational strengths compared to its rivals, Ethereum (ETH) and Solana (SOL). Why Cardano Is Van Lagen’s Top Pick Central to van Lagen’s argument is the concept of decentralization, where he...

articles.title: Bitcoin Soars To 10th Largest Asset Globally, Leaving Berkshire Hathaway And JPMorgan Behind
articles.description: Bitcoin’s recent accomplishments and ongoing rally have stirred palpable excitement among cryptocurrency enthusiasts and investors alike. In a groundbreaking move, Bitcoin has secured its position as the 10th largest asset in the world, surpassing stalwarts such as Berkshire Hathaway, Tesla, and JPMorgan. The cryptocurrency’s market capitalization, nearing the $1 trillion mark, reflects an...

articles.title: Algorithmic Stablecoins Are More Suitable For The Crypto Industry: Charles Hoskinson
articles.description: According to Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson, algorithmic stablecoins are more suitable for the crypto industry. Hoskinson made the statement during an interview with the Discover Crypto crew while responding to questions about some stakeholders in the crypto ecosystem refusing to associate with the project. Hoskinson noted that Cardano’s uprightness may be why some projects and […]
